calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Lauren Gelber, Esq. for and with Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant: Ardene Ballonado.
Kathy Steiman, Esq. for and with Defendant/Cross-Plaintiff: Anna Bedia.
Warren Metlitzky, DCA. for Defendant: City and County of San Francisco.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiffs to dismissed the action with prejudice, and to pay the Defendant: C.C.S.F. $2,500.00 for full litigation costs.
Cross-Complaint settled in the amount of $3,500.00, each to bear own costs and fees.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
